name: Hillary Clinton
subject: Please chip in before midnight
body:
I know we can count on you. | Peter, I’m so grateful for this team and everything you’re doing to help win this election -- if we keep this up, there’s no doubt in my mind that we can win big on November 8th.

But if we assume even for a second that the momentum we're all feeling now guarantees we'll win in November, we open the door for Trump and his supporters to come back and win this race. **[That’s why it’s so important for you to chip in to hit tonight’s mid-month fundraising goal -- can you help right now? When you make your first donation before midnight, we’ll send you a free sticker. ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjYyNDYxNzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyNTUyMzQ1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

** I'm sure you're seeing us up in public polls, but I’ve seen larger leads evaporate in the final weeks of an election.

Trump and the Republicans may not always act seriously, but we have to take them very seriously -- and if you doubt me, just look at the $82 million they raised in July alone.

If we don’t match -- or hopefully exceed -- their efforts in August, I know we'll regret it.

**We still need 12 people from your town to help before midnight if we're going to hit our goal -- and since you’re one of my best supporters, I know we can count on you. Will you chip in $1 right now?** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjYyNDYxNzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyNTUyMzQ1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Hillary

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 to help meet our mid-month goal before midnight:**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjYyNDYxNzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyNTUyMzQ1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

[Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjYyNDYxNzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyNTUyMzQ1S0&mt=1&rt=0)! name: Marco Rubio
subject: Did you get Obama's email?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate 2016
body:
Did you see the email Obama sent? | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/37035414:WOou8Qb2N:m:1:1328517760:C418854B08F2F820A7BA7EC79970983E:r)
---

Friend -- Did you get the email President Obama sent?

In case you did not, he just sent out an email trying to convince all Florida voters to vote for my Democratic opponent.

**Friend, it's rare for a sitting president to be so involved in a Senate race, but he is because the balance of the Senate depends on what happens in Florida.**

No matter where you live, the outcome of this race will impact you and our future.

**We cannot afford to lose -- I need all of the support we can get. I need to know today, Friend, whose side are you on? Are you with my opponent and President Obama, or[are you with me](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/37035414:WOou8Qb2N:m:1:1328517760:C418854B08F2F820A7BA7EC79970983E:r)? **

| [** DONATE $25 TODAY >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/37035415:WOou8Qb2N:m:1:1328517760:C418854B08F2F820A7BA7EC79970983E:r)

[** DONATE $500 TODAY >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/37035419:WOou8Qb2N:m:1:1328517760:C418854B08F2F820A7BA7EC79970983E:r)
---

[** DONATE $1000 TODAY >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/37035420:WOou8Qb2N:m:1:1328517760:C418854B08F2F820A7BA7EC79970983E:r)
---

There are now only two weeks until our August 30th Primary. While my opponents have had the advantage campaigning for the last year, I've had less than two months.

I'd be insincere if I didn't admit that I am nervous about this race. It will be hard fought and millions will pour in from liberal special interest groups from across the nation. _**And Friend, so much is at stake this November.**_

This Senate race will determine the balance of the U.S. Senate. Whoever wins in Florida will help propel their Party to the majority. If Senate Democrats gain the majority, I know we'll have more spending, higher taxes on the middle-class, stagnant job growth, see restrictions on our religious and second amendment rights, and - _most importantly_ \- less security for Americans.

Can you imagine if Hillary Clinton wins the White House AND Senate Democrats gain the majority? Friend, that's not an America I would like to see. But with your support today, we can win in November, maintain a Republican majority in the Senate, and make sure we provide a fruitful and prosperous future for all Americans.

Friend, I know you've already been so generous in the past, and I hate to ask for your support once again, but I wouldn't ask if the need wasn't urgent. With Obama's email, you know thousands, if not millions, of dollars will pour into our race.

**[That's why it's so important that I have the support of conservatives like you. Please use this secure link to donate today to my re-election campaign as we face an important August deadline - my August 30th Primary.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/37035414:WOou8Qb2N:m:1:1328517760:C418854B08F2F820A7BA7EC79970983E:r)**

Friend, thank you so much for your support so far. I know if you're with me, we can accomplish anything.

Thanks,

Marco Rubio

P.S. Obama is counting on my opponent to win in November and continue his work after he leaves the Oval Office. **I need to know I can count on you and keep the Senate majority.[Please follow this link or one of the buttons below to make a much needed contribution to my campaign right now.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/37035414:WOou8Qb2N:m:1:1328517760:C418854B08F2F820A7BA7EC79970983E:r)**

[** DONATE TODAY **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/37035414:WOou8Qb2N:m:1:1328517760:C418854B08F2F820A7BA7EC79970983E:r)

Friend, it's rare for a sitting president to be so involved in a Senate race, but he is because the balance of the Senate depends on what happens in Florida. No matter where you live, the outcome of this race will impact you and our future. We cannot afford to lose -- I need all of the support we can get. I need to know today, Friend, whose side are you on? Are you with my opponent and President Obama, or? | There are now only two weeks until our August 30th Primary. While my opponents have had the advantage campaigning for the last year, I've had less than two months. I'd be insincere if I didn't admit that I am nervous about this race. It will be hard fought and millions will pour in from liberal special interest groups from across the nation. And Friend, so much is at stake this November. This Senate race will determine the balance of the U.S. Senate. Whoever wins in Florida will help propel their Party to the majority. If Senate Democrats gain the majority, I know we'll have more spending, higher taxes on the middle-class, stagnant job growth, see restrictions on our religious and second amendment rights, and - most importantly \- less security for Americans. Can you imagine if Hillary Clinton wins the White House AND Senate Democrats gain the majority? Friend, that's not an America I would like to see. But with your support today, we can win in November, maintain a Republican majority in the Senate, and make sure we provide a fruitful and prosperous future for all Americans. Friend, I know you've already been so generous in the past, and I hate to ask for your support once again, but I wouldn't ask if the need wasn't urgent. With Obama's email, you know thousands, if not millions, of dollars will pour into our race. Friend, thank you so much for your support so far. I know if you're with me, we can accomplish anything. Thanks, Marco Rubio P.S. Obama is counting on my opponent to win in November and continue his work after he leaves the Oval Office. I need to know I can count on you and keep the Senate majority. | Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate 2016 This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system April 4, 2016. name: Andrew Whalen, Team Koster
subject: BREAKING: Law Enforcement Leaders Endorse Koster
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Koster for Missouri, Gary Mallory, Treasurer
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/5211293250518124544/1738249319058114560?utm_campaign=fnd_fop_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=koster&refcode=em16_160816_fnd_gq_fop_act__aw)

Hi,
**The Missouri Fraternal Order of Police (FOP) today announced their endorsement of our campaign.** The Missouri FOP represents over 6,500 police men and women in the state.

This is a special honor for Chris, who has spent his career working with law enforcement to deliver justice for Missourians who have been unfairly victimized.

Missouri needs a Governor who will work tirelessly with state legislators, community leaders, and law enforcement to make our communities safer. **As our next Governor, Chris will work to reestablish trust between our communities and law enforcement** **by:**
* Increasing pay for police
* Providing rifle-rated vests to keep officers safe
* Supporting community policing
* Working to make police forces more representative of the communities they serve

Police officers are among the most important members of our civic community and Chris will always have their backs in appreciation for their service.
We are honored to have this endorsement and look forward to working towards a Missouri where honest folks are never treated like criminals and police have the support they need.

Thank you,

Andrew Whalen
Campaign Manager

name: Bullock HQ
subject: have you noticed a pattern?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
---
Friend,

Greg Gianforte is up with yet another new TV ad, bringing his total to eight (and it's only August). He's been on the air for more than four months and has now spent a total of $1.7 million dollars on television commercials alone. **[We need our grassroots supporters to come through more than ever. Please chip in $15.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=u5fN38z%2F%2Fpn9eTKCc25yQzcHwdzhubg7)**

In his latest spot, Mr. Gianforte brags about all of his charitable giving. So we thought we'd do a quick roundup of some of his most notable donations:
* $1.1 million dollars to anti-LGBT organizations
* Almost $700,000 to so-called "crisis pregnancy centers" that provide misleading, factually inaccurate information to women
* Tens of thousands to groups that want to sell off our public lands to the highest bidder
* He is listed as a "substantial contributor" to the group associated with the lawyer behind Citizens United and who is fighting campaign finance reform across the country

These contributions form a pattern that is way out of step with Montana values. **And they should give all of us pause about what his agenda really would be in the governor 's office.**

Steve is keeping our state on track with responsible fiscal management, but with Greg Gianforte already putting in more than a million dollars of his own fortune into his campaign, we need your help to make sure we can tell our positive story. **[Please pitch in $15.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=unStNhtFpnPBZ970u17TdTcHwdzhubg7)**

Thanks,
Bullock HQ

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: re: super PACs
body:
The attacks are coming | Peter --

Over the weekend, we learned that one of Donald Trump's super PACs is preparing to launch a nationwide series of attack ads targeting Hillary -- with most of their spending concentrated in the battleground states.

The Trump campaign proper, meanwhile, is still sitting on a massive war chest from their big July fundraising haul. And Trump himself is planning 21 separate finance events this month with top donors in the Republican Party. For the first time in this election, he's making a serious effort to raise incredible amounts of money.

Taken together, those two things signal a shift in strategy from Trump and his allies -- at least if I'm reading the signs correctly.

Knowing they can't compete with our organizers on the ground, Trump and company are going to try to swamp us in the worst attacks they can dream up -- and make this race so ugly and awful that they'll convince a bunch of people to stay home.

The gamble they're making is that Trump's true believers are more committed than we are. They think if they're the only ones who show up on Election Day, they'll win.

If that's actually what's coming, we really can't afford to get knocked off our game. We really can't afford to get outraised. And most of all, we can't afford to show less enthusiasm or commitment than Trump's core supporters. Not when Hillary's counting on us most.

**The attacks are coming. Chip in right now to show that you have Hillary's back (and when you do, we’ll send a Team Hillary sticker to say thank you):** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjYyNTEzMTUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyNjYyMzY4S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Robby

name: Bill Cole
subject: My Plan to Combat the Drug Epidemic
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF COLE
body:
| |
---
| Friend --

I unveiled my seven-point action plan __ to combat our state’s growing drug epidemic today. Yesterday, in a four-hour time span there were [26 calls to 911 in Huntington](http://www.billcolewv.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.wsaz.com%2Fcontent%2Fnews%2FPolice-respond-to-more-than-half-a-dozen-overdoses-in-Huntington-390231681.html&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=cole_unveils_dp&n=1) for reported drug overdoses – one every nine minutes. The drug crisis is literally destroying our cherished way of life. West Virginia needs a leader who will tackle our state’s drug epidemic head on. The proliferation of heroin and other opiates, as well as the misuse of prescription painkillers and other medications, is wrecking families and robbing our young people of the opportunity to learn, to work, and to prosper. We have a crisis in West Virginia like no other that I can recall in my lifetime. The time has come not just to act, but to act boldly - decisively - and with great conviction. My seven-point action plan calls for stiffer penalties for drug kingpins, because anyone caught bringing their poison into our state should pay a huge price. I intend to put them behind bars for a long time. Under my administration, anyone who calls a hotline for help will have access to a treatment program in their community. We are going to retrain our unemployed workers and put them to work as drug counselors. We are going to retool existing buildings and convert them into treatment facilities. And, we are going to use existing federal resources to help pay for it.

**My 7-Point ACTION Plan to Combat West Virginia’s Drug Epidemic:** **ACTION POINT #1:** My first act as Governor will be to call the Legislature into a special session to deal with the drug epidemic. **ACTION POINT #2:** I will work with the Legislature to pass harsher penalties –including mandatory sentencing for drug kingpins who are peddling meth and heroin to our children. **ACTION POINT #3:** It’s critical that our judicial system punish the pushers in such a manner that they will no longer pose a threat to our families, our friends, and our communities. In addressing our laws as they relate to drug offenses, we also will continue to support our state’s juvenile and adult drug courts. We will make sure judges maintain the flexibility and discretion to provide appropriate direction to those who have fallen victim to the perils of drug addiction and substance abuse, and who demonstrate the potential to get clean, get a job, and return as a productive member of society. **ACTION POINT #4:** I will use existing positions within the Governor’s office to create the Office of Drug Action to coordinate an intra-agency task force made up of the Secretaries of the Departments of Commerce, Education and the Arts, Health and Human Resources and Military Affairs and Public Safety as well as other appropriate state agencies. Because the scope of this crisis is so great, we need all the resources of state government working together to tackle this epidemic. The role of such an office will be to assist in facilitating and coordinating all public, private, and nonprofit efforts throughout the state without micromanaging those on the front lines who know and understand the problems they face on a day-to-day basis and who are best suited to seek and apply a solution. **ACTION POINT #5:** I will immediately begin to identify, inventory, and evaluate all of the education, treatment, recovery, and job placement programs that are currently utilized by state and local government, and from nonprofit and private organizations. I will prioritize these initiatives and redirect public funding and private funding to those enterprises with a proven record of success. **ACTION POINT #6:** I will leverage federal dollars for job training funding to train laid off workers for rehabilitation jobs and repurpose existing buildings using existing federal dollars to create and expand the availability of treatment centers for anyone who wants help. These centers will provide people with the assistance that is necessary to transition them back into a life in which they can work, support their families, and create a life of hope and opportunity. The state will aggressively pursue federal drug grants that we are currently missing to ensure that when someone calls a hotline for help, there will be a treatment program available for them in their community. **ACTION POINT #7:** I will launch an unprecedented program of awareness and education targeted at supporting and expanding our current drug prevention and resistance programs, and provide additional substantive information on the destructive nature of the problem through a broader range of delivery systems, including social media.

body:
Jay's taking the stage on August 17th -- do you have his back? [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTM2MDg4OAS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTgxMjczNjc0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
| Dear Friend, The general election is here, and that means it's debate time. The first one is in just two days! | ☑ Jay's vision for Washington vs. Republican Bill Bryant's backward ideas
☑ Jay's plan to build a stronger economy vs. Bryant's plan to keep the minimum wage as low as possible
☑ Jay's values and passion for our communities vs. Bryant's divisive politics

**If you 're on Jay's side of this debate, step up today.**
| [**CONTRIBUTE »**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=OTM2MDg4OAS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTgxMjczNjc0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
---
Jay will be taking the stage to debate Republican Bill Bryant in Spokane on August 17th. We know what side we're on: We're on the side for progress on education, transportation, health care, and beyond.

I wish I didn't need to send this email. | Peter --

I know how invested you are in this campaign, so I wanted to make sure you heard from me about our progress for the month.

At a time when we should be crushing the other side in fundraising -- and building the strongest voter outreach operation we can -- our fundraising has actually been falling just a little bit short of our projections, day-by-day.

On a different kind of campaign, in another election, I might not need to send this email. But everything we've built up to this point has come with the support of 2 million people like you. You're literally the source of most of the money this campaign raises.

And this year, I can’t even tell you how important it is that we not just win this thing, but win by a huge margin. Anything less will leave the door open for Trump to claim that we “rigged” this election.

| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**

**Media Contact:**
Ethan Latour
[ethan@philscott.org](mailto:ethan@philscott.org)
802-595-3776
**Statement on Recent Spike in Opiate Overdoses**
Montpelier, Vt. – Phil Scott today issued the following statement on the recent spike in opiate overdoses:

"The recent spike in opiate overdoses in my hometown of Barre is an important reminder of the dangers of addiction and the work we still have ahead of us as a state to combat this public health crisis.

"Earlier this month, at an event with members of the Vermont Sheriffs' Association in Rutland, I laid out my comprehensive plan to combat opiate addiction. Addiction – and opiate addiction specifically – affects all Vermonters. It isn’t just a city problem or a young people problem or a Vermont problem – it has become an issue for all people in all communities across the nation.

"My 10-point Opioid Action Plan focuses on facilitating collaboration to strengthen our education/prevention, treatment and enforcement strategies.

"As Governor, my administration will work with partners in local and federal government, and with health care providers, to ensure that Vermont has a long-term, forward-thinking approach to addiction prevention and recovery."

To learn more about Phil's 10-point Opioid Action Plan, visit the plans page on our website [here](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=061fdba427&e=19cebfe173).

**Phil Scott: Leadership that Listens**
Lieutenant Governor Phil Scott has been a consistent voice of reason and common sense in Montpelier. Phil is running for Governor to make growing the economy and making Vermont more affordable Montpelier's top priorities. Read about Phil Scott’s plans at [www.philscott.org](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=234dc434de&e=19cebfe173).

subject: What I stand for
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana |
body:
My name is Eric Holcomb and I’m the Republican nominee for Governor of Indiana. Now, I’ll admit launching a campaign, introducing myself to the entir
---
| [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/eaaf794be23f4410863abb4c721077b6?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=79bcc962a3904cbba8fc6b218d9a2298&utm_source=Iterable&utm_medium=Image_Header_Logo&utm_term=Campaign-endorsement&utm_campaign=GFR&utm_content=20160815-what-i-stand-for-16266-petition) |
| Friend,

**My name is Eric Holcomb and I’m the Republican nominee for Governor of Indiana.**

Now, I’ll admit launching a campaign, introducing myself to the entire state, and winning this election in less than 100 days is no easy task. That’s why I wanted to share my story with you and your family.

I am a proud, lifelong Hoosier. I grew up in Indianapolis, attended Pike High School, and graduated from Hanover College with a degree in U.S. History.

I’m a veteran of the United States Navy, a former advisor to both Governor Mitch Daniels and Senator Dan Coats, and a former state chairman of the Indiana Republican Party.

Currently serving as our state’s Lieutenant Governor, I oversee a varied and diversified portfolio that includes the Indiana State Department of Agriculture, the Indiana Housing and Community Development Authority, the Office of Defense Development, the Office of Community and Rural Affairs and the Office of Tourism Development. I also serve as chairman of the Indiana Counter-Terrorism and Security Council and President of the Indiana Senate.

**I want you to also hear about my record and commitment to Indiana from Senator Dan Coats in the video below:** |
| [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/5c4016688f9f435ca0ca6e2149e84ea3?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=79bcc962a3904cbba8fc6b218d9a2298&utm_source=Iterable&utm_medium=Image_body_insert&utm_term=Campaign-endorsement&utm_campaign=GFR&utm_content=20160815-what-i-stand-for-16266-petition) |
| **Now, those are just the things I’ve done. Let me tell you about what I stand for.**

I believe we need a true consensus builder who can get things done and find results that work for all Hoosiers. Through commonsense, conservative principles, we can continue Indiana’s momentum moving forward. And that’s why I need you on my team.

**May I ask for your vote so we can keep us on the path forward?** |
| [Pledge your vote](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/03d921e014594a7d871f91cbb7ae2414?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=79bcc962a3904cbba8fc6b218d9a2298&utm_source=Iterable&utm_medium=button_body_text&utm_term=Campaign-endorsement&utm_campaign=GFR&utm_content=20160815-what-i-stand-for-16266-petition) |
| Thank you,
Eric Holcomb |
| |
